data.title: Reykjavík Energy concludes green bond auction with bids totaling ISK 1,700 million across three classes on August 28, 2025.
data.description: On August 28th, 2025, Reykjavík Energy (Orkuveita Reykjavíkur) wrapped up a green bond auction for green bond classes OR031033 GB, OR280845 GB, and OR180255 GB. The total value of bids received was ISK 1,700 million.

data.title: World Liberty Financial (CRYPTO: WLFI) to launch governance token WLFI on Sep. 1, alongside stablecoin USD1 fully backed by cash and U.S. Treasuries. Token is both governance-based and deflationary. Trump family linked to venture.
data.description: A new DeFi project, World Liberty Financial (CRYPTO: WLFI), associated with President Donald Trump's family, will introduce its governance token WLFI on Sep. 1. The token launch coincides with its stablecoin USD1, backed by cash and short-term U.S. Treasuries. An analysis by trader Hoeem highlighted that unlike other stablecoins benefiting corporate shareholders, USD1's yield is used to buy and burn WLFI through smart contracts, making the token governance-focused and deflationary. Additionally, the Trump family has direct involvement in the project. Full article can be read on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hands of Hope achieves CHAP certification for pediatric program, offering care for ages 0-21 in SC, GA, and parts of NC.
data.description: A home-based pediatric program called Hands of Hope, part of Agape Care Group, based in Spartanburg, South Carolina, has received program certification from CHAP, the Community Health Accreditation Partner. This certification makes Hands of Hope one of just nine hospice programs in the country to earn specialized pediatric certification. Serving children aged 0-21 in South Carolina, Georgia, and various regions of North Carolina, Hands of Hope provides palliative and concurrent hospice care. The program's team collaborates closely with the child's...

data.title: Pagaya will attend investor conferences on Sep 3 and 4 in New York and on Sep 9 in Tel Aviv.
data.description: Pagaya Technologies Ltd. declared that its management team will engage in upcoming investor conferences. They will be participating in the Jefferies FinTech Conference on September 3, 2025, in New York, NY, and the Benchmark TMT Conference on September 4, 2025, in the same location. Additionally, they are set to attend the EY JournEY on September 9, 2025, in Tel Aviv, IL. The Company is known for offering AI-driven financial solutions globally.

data.title: Russell 2000 surges to 9-month high, Bitcoin falls below $110,000. TNA ETF rises as Russell 2000 climbs 1%, outperforming S&P, on bets of Fed rate cut. Small-cap benchmark hits highest since December 2024, with strongest monthly outperformance versus S&P 500 since July 2024. S&P 500 remains flat near 6,450, Nasdaq 100 inches up to 23,481, Dow Jones around 45,300. Wall Street awaits NVIDIA Corp. (NVDA) quarterly results.
data.description: Investors are closely monitoring the surge in small-cap stocks this Tuesday morning, with the Russell 2000 index climbing by 1%, outperforming larger market peers. This rise comes amidst increasing speculation of a Federal Reserve interest rate reduction in the upcoming month. The TNA ETF is experiencing significant growth in tandem with the Russell 2000 rally. The small-cap benchmark has reached its highest point since December 2024 and is heading towards its most substantial monthly outperformance against the S&P 500 since July 2024. This trend indicates a shift by investors towards more economically sensitive assets in anticipation of relaxed monetary policies. While the Russell 2000 shows strong upward movement, the S&P 500 remains stable around 6,450 points, the Nasdaq 100 has risen by 0.2% to 23,481 points, and the Dow Jones is hovering around 45,300. Wall Street is currently adopting a cautious approach in anticipation of NVIDIA Corp.'s (NASDAQ: NVDA) quarterly results on Wednesday. For the complete article, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Big Dawg Party Rentals makes Inc. 5000 list & Inc. Best Workplaces 2025 for growth & employee culture.
data.description: In Brooklyn, New York, Big Dawg Party Rentals, a prominent event rental company, revealed today that it has secured a spot on the prestigious Inc. 5000 list of fastest-growing private companies in the U.S., in addition to being recognized as one of the Inc. Best Workplaces for 2025. This double achievement highlights Big Dawg's success in the rental industry, showcasing significant growth alongside a workplace culture that prioritizes employees, encouraging innovation, dedication, and top-notch operations. The company's commitment to excellence is evident through these accolades.

data.title: Prediction: Will Dogecoin surge or plummet on Myriad? Plus, SharpLink's Ethereum treasury size outweighs U.S. Open champ.
data.description: This week, notable trends on Myriad revolve around several key market predictions. One of the forecasts focuses on Dogecoin's price movement, indicating potential shifts in the popular cryptocurrency's value. Additionally, there is attention on SharpLink's significant Ethereum holdings, suggesting a noteworthy stake in the digital asset. Finally, market watchers are also speculating on the potential winner of the U.S. Open, adding an element of sports betting to the mix. These predictions and analyses are generating interest and activity on the platform, with users closely monitoring these insights for potential investment opportunities.

data.title: Box to present at Citi's 2025 Global TMT Conference on Sep 3, 2025 at 2:10pm ET in New York. Webcast available.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, Box (NYSE: BOX), a prominent Intelligent Content Management platform, disclosed that executives will be speaking at the upcoming Citi’s 2025 Global TMT Conference. The presentation is scheduled for September 3, 2025, at 2:10pm ET in the New York Hilton Midtown, New York. Those interested can watch the live webcast on boxinvestorrelations.com, with a replay accessible around twelve hours post the live event.

data.title: US imposes 15% tariffs on EU wine and spirits hurting industry worth €30 billion. French wine exports to US at 41%, major impact expected.
data.description: US consumers would face higher prices on European wine and spirits as President Trump's trade deal with the EU locks in a 15% tariff on most EU exports. Despite lobbying efforts, the EU's €30 billion wine and spirits industry did not receive an exemption. The US Chamber of Commerce warned that tariffs could cost the typical household about $4,000 per year, affecting small businesses and households. France, the world's largest exporter of wine and spirits, faces potential impacts with €12.1 billion worth of exports in 2024. Bordeaux winemakers are preparing for the hit, as the US imports 30% of the EU's products and consumes 20% of Bordeaux's annual output, valued at €400 million.

data.title: Huawei hosts "Future of Gaming Salon - Germany Edition" in Cologne to connect Chinese and European gaming ecosystems.
data.description: In Cologne, Germany on August 28, 2025, Huawei held the "Future of Gaming Salon – Germany Edition" to bridge the gaming communities of China and Europe. The event, led by Huawei Game Center, brought together key players from the Chinese gaming sector.

data.title: Veeva Systems Inc. beats Q2 earnings estimates with $1.99/share, $789.081M sales. FY2026 guidance raised to $7.78 EPS, $3.134-$3.140B sales. CEO highlights vision of connected software and business consulting for life sciences.
data.description: Veeva Systems Inc., listed on NYSE as VEEV, exceeded expectations with its second-quarter earnings report. Earnings per share stood at $1.99, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.90, and quarterly sales were reported at $789.081 million, beating the estimated $768.417 million. The company also adjusted its guidance for FY2026, increasing the adjusted EPS from $7.63 to $7.78 and raising sales guidance from $3.090 billion-$3.100 billion to $3.134 billion-$3.140 billion. CEO Peter Gassner expressed excitement for the company's growth and highlighted the potential of Veeva AI and Veeva Data Cloud in driving transformational change in the life sciences sector.

data.title: Cytokinetics grants stock options to 46 new employees - 105,169 shares & 70,879 RSUs, totaling 176,048 shares.
data.description: On August 15, 2025, Cytokinetics, Incorporated (Nasdaq: CYTK) based in South San Francisco, California, awarded stock options to buy a total of 105,169 shares of common stock and 70,879 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 46 new employees who started working in July and August 2025. The RSUs will be converted into common stock upon vesting. This action was taken as a significant incentive for their employment.

data.title: Chainlink's LINK price jumps 1.67% to $24.92, aiming for $27 resistance. Bulls in control with mixed signals.
data.description: The price of LINK has surged to $24.92, driven by a powerful bullish trend that has surpassed important moving averages. The digital asset is now eyeing a resistance level of $27.87 amidst conflicting signals from technical indicators.
